title: LionsCoordHud
description: A Simple Coordinate Hud with core features of moving, enabling and disabling the Hud.
body:
Clean Minecraft Coordinate HUD Mod

The Clean Minecraft Coordinate HUD is a lightweight mod that enhances your Minecraft experience by providing a simple, clean, and customizable heads-up display (HUD) of your current coordinates. Unlike traditional HUD mods, this mod focuses on minimalism and clarity, offering just the essentials without cluttering the screen with unnecessary information.

Key Features:
Real-Time Coordinates: Display your current X, Y, and Z coordinates right on your screen in real-time.

Minimal Design: A streamlined, no-frills display that blends well with the game’s environment without distracting you from the gameplay.

Customizable Position: Choose where on the screen the coordinates appear, whether it’s the top-left, top-right, bottom-left, or bottom-right.

Customizable Text: Adjust the font size and color of the coordinates for easy readability, whether in day or night mode.

Easy Installation: Drop the mod into your mods folder, and the coordinates will show up instantly in-game without needing complex configuration.

Why Choose This Mod?
Clean & Simple: Unlike other coordinate HUD mods that can overwhelm you with excessive information, this mod focuses solely on the coordinates that matter.

Customizable: Adjust to your preference to ensure that the coordinates are placed exactly where you want them.

No Performance Impact: The mod is lightweight and has a negligible impact on game performance, keeping your experience smooth.

Whether you're exploring, building, or navigating your world, the Clean Minecraft Coordinate HUD ensures you always know where you are without any distractions.
